Project.NAME: japan-travel-rag-mcp
Project.keywords: japan-travel, mcp, proxy, tg-chat-rag, oauth, logto, jwks, dcr, admin-ui, postgres, drizzle, contract-first
Project.annotation: OAuth-only architecture for /mcp using Logto-issued access tokens and MCP OAuth discovery metadata. Admin login remains rooted in ROOT_AUTH_TOKEN for internal operator access.

M-CONFIG.NAME: Config
M-CONFIG.purpose: Runtime config validation for MCP server, admin authentication, and OAuth resource server settings.

fn-loadConfig.description: Validate env and return typed AppConfig

type-AppConfig.description: Configuration object including tg-chat-rag, ROOT_AUTH_TOKEN, and OAuth settings

M-LOGGER.NAME: Logger
M-LOGGER.purpose: Structured logging for boot lifecycle, OAuth guard decisions, admin auth decisions, and upstream failures.

M-DB.NAME: DrizzleDb
M-DB.purpose: Initialize and expose Drizzle PostgreSQL client from DATABASE_URL for current and future persistence modules.

fn-createDb.description: Create Drizzle database client and connection pool

M-TOOLS-CONTRACTS.NAME: ToolContracts
M-TOOLS-CONTRACTS.purpose: Schema and allowlist registry for MCP tools proxied in v1.

schema-SearchMessagesInputPublic.description: Public search_messages schema that forbids filters.chat_ids

const-PROXIED_TOOL_NAMES.description: Allowed tools: search_messages, get_message_context, get_related_messages, list_sources

M-TG-CHAT-RAG-CLIENT.NAME: TgChatRagClient
M-TG-CHAT-RAG-CLIENT.purpose: HTTP adapter for tg-chat-rag methods API with service-level Bearer token authentication.

fn-callMethod.description: POST to /api/v1/methods/<tool_name> and return parsed response

type-UpstreamCallError.description: Normalized error payload for timeout, auth, and protocol failures

M-OAUTH-DISCOVERY.NAME: OAuthDiscoveryRoutes
M-OAUTH-DISCOVERY.purpose: Serve OAuth protected resource metadata for MCP OAuth client bootstrap.

fn-handleOAuthProtectedResourceMetadata.description: Return protected resource metadata for /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource routes

M-OAUTH-JWKS.NAME: OAuthJwksClient
M-OAUTH-JWKS.purpose: Fetch and cache issuer JWKS keys for access token signature verification.

fn-getSigningKey.description: Resolve signing key by kid using cache-aware JWKS refresh

fn-refreshJwks.description: Refresh in-memory JWKS cache from OAuth issuer

M-OAUTH-TOKEN-VALIDATOR.NAME: OAuthTokenValidator
M-OAUTH-TOKEN-VALIDATOR.purpose: Validate OAuth Bearer access token signature and claims for /mcp authorization.

fn-validateAccessToken.description: Validate Bearer token with iss/aud/exp/nbf/scope checks

M-ADMIN-AUTH.NAME: AdminAuth
M-ADMIN-AUTH.purpose: Authenticate admin login attempts using ROOT_AUTH_TOKEN and enforce admin session cookie checks.

fn-authenticateAdmin.description: Validate login token and issue signed session cookie

fn-requireAdminSession.description: Allow admin request or return redirect decision

M-API-KEY-REPOSITORY.NAME: ApiKeyRepository
M-API-KEY-REPOSITORY.purpose: Persist and resolve API key lifecycle records for legacy admin operations and transition-period auth wiring.

fn-createApiKeyRepository.description: Build repository for create/list/revoke/resolve API key operations

type-ApiKeyRecord.description: API key metadata record used by admin and auth layers

M-MCP-AUTH-GUARD.NAME: McpAuthGuard
M-MCP-AUTH-GUARD.purpose: Authorize /mcp requests using OAuth access tokens before transport execution.

fn-authorizeMcpRequest.description: Validate OAuth Bearer token and return allow/deny decision

fn-buildWwwAuthenticateHeader.description: Build standards-compliant challenge header for denied requests

M-TOOL-PROXY.NAME: ToolProxyService
M-TOOL-PROXY.purpose: Tool-level proxy orchestration: validate input, enforce internal chat scope, forward request, normalize response.

fn-executeTool.description: Main proxy execution function for all exposed MCP tools

fn-buildSearchPayload.description: Inject filters.chat_ids from config and reject external chat_ids

M-ADMIN-UI.NAME: AdminUiRoutes
M-ADMIN-UI.purpose: Render Bun JSX admin pages and HTMX fragments for operator login and OAuth diagnostics.

fn-renderAdminLayout.description: Render admin layout with OAuth ops tab

M-TRANSPORT.NAME: McpTransport
M-TRANSPORT.purpose: MCP transport registration and request handling for the proxied tool set.

fn-registerTools.description: Register four MCP tools and wire handlers to ToolProxyService

fn-handleMcpRequest.description: Handle /mcp requests using streamable MCP transport

M-SERVER.NAME: ServerMain
M-SERVER.purpose: Process entrypoint with boot sequence and HTTP routes (/mcp, /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource*, /admin/*, /healthz) using OAuth challenge responses for unauthorized MCP requests.
M-SERVER.depends: M-CONFIG, M-LOGGER, M-DB, M-API-KEY-REPOSITORY, M-ADMIN-AUTH, M-ADMIN-UI, M-MCP-AUTH-GUARD, M-OAUTH-DISCOVERY, M-OAUTH-TOKEN-VALIDATOR, M-TG-CHAT-RAG-CLIENT, M-TOOL-PROXY, M-TRANSPORT

fn-main.description: Boot server, wire auth guards, and route MCP/discovery/admin/health requests

fn-createUnauthorizedMcpResponse.description: Build standardized 401 response with OAuth WWW-Authenticate challenge metadata

M-ROOT-ENTRYPOINT.NAME: RootEntrypoint
M-ROOT-ENTRYPOINT.purpose: Root runtime bootstrap that invokes server main and maps fatal startup failures to process exit code.

fn-bootstrap.description: Run server main() and handle fatal startup errors

M-TRANSPORT-SMOKE.NAME: McpTransportSmokeTests
M-TRANSPORT-SMOKE.purpose: Smoke validation for MCP transport tool surface and OAuth auth-gated routing behavior.
M-TRANSPORT-SMOKE.depends: M-TRANSPORT, M-TOOLS-CONTRACTS, M-TOOL-PROXY, M-MCP-AUTH-GUARD, M-OAUTH-TOKEN-VALIDATOR, M-LOGGER

fn-TransportSmokeTests.description: Smoke checks for tools/list and tools/call with OAuth unauthorized/authorized scenarios

M-SERVER-OAUTH-CHALLENGE-TEST.NAME: ServerOAuthChallengeTests
M-SERVER-OAUTH-CHALLENGE-TEST.purpose: Focused verification of standardized /mcp unauthorized OAuth challenge response formatting.

fn-ServerOAuthChallengeTests.description: Asserts 401 payload and WWW-Authenticate challenge composition for OAuth denial responses

M-DOCKER-DEV.NAME: DockerComposeDev
M-DOCKER-DEV.purpose: Development container orchestration for MCP server with local source mount and .env loading.

cfg-mcp-service.description: Single mcp service running bun run index.ts with /healthz healthcheck

M-DOCKER-PROD.NAME: DockerComposeProd
M-DOCKER-PROD.purpose: Production container orchestration for MCP server with required runtime env vars and external network.

cfg-mcp-service.description: Single mcp service running bun run index.ts on external coolify network

M-DOCKER-IMAGE.NAME: DockerImage
M-DOCKER-IMAGE.purpose: Container image build definition for MCP HTTP server runtime.

cfg-release-stage.description: Builds Bun runtime image with sources and production dependencies

DF-ADMIN-LOGIN.NAME: admin login flow
DF-ADMIN-LOGIN.step-2: M-ADMIN-AUTH validates token and sets signed admin session cookie.

DF-OAUTH-DISCOVERY.NAME: oauth protected resource discovery flow
DF-OAUTH-DISCOVERY.step-3: Client initiates OAuth authorization at Logto.

DF-MCP-AUTH.NAME: mcp oauth auth flow
DF-MCP-AUTH.step-1: Client calls /mcp with Authorization Bearer access token.
DF-MCP-AUTH.step-3: M-OAUTH-TOKEN-VALIDATOR verifies token using M-OAUTH-JWKS and claim checks.
DF-MCP-AUTH.step-4: Unauthorized request is rejected before MCP transport handler with WWW-Authenticate challenge.

DF-PROXY-SEARCH.NAME: search_messages proxy flow
DF-PROXY-SEARCH.step-1: Authorized MCP caller invokes search_messages without chat_ids input.
DF-PROXY-SEARCH.step-2: M-TOOL-PROXY injects chat IDs from TG_CHAT_RAG_CHAT_IDS.
DF-PROXY-SEARCH.step-3: M-TG-CHAT-RAG-CLIENT forwards request to /api/v1/methods/search_messages with service token.
DF-PROXY-SEARCH.step-4: Response is returned to caller in MCP format.

DF-PROXY-CONTEXT.NAME: get_message_context proxy flow
DF-PROXY-CONTEXT.step-2: M-TOOL-PROXY validates and forwards unchanged payload to /api/v1/methods/get_message_context.
DF-PROXY-CONTEXT.step-3: Response is returned to caller in MCP format.

DF-PROXY-RELATED.NAME: get_related_messages proxy flow
DF-PROXY-RELATED.step-2: M-TOOL-PROXY validates and forwards unchanged payload to /api/v1/methods/get_related_messages.
DF-PROXY-RELATED.step-3: Response is returned to caller in MCP format.

DF-PROXY-SOURCES.NAME: list_sources proxy flow
DF-PROXY-SOURCES.step-2: M-TOOL-PROXY validates and forwards unchanged payload to /api/v1/methods/list_sources.
DF-PROXY-SOURCES.step-3: Response is returned to caller in MCP format.

CrossLink.relation: reads runtime config for log setup
uses DATABASE_URL to initialize Drizzle PostgreSQL client
emits db initialization and connectivity diagnostics
uses ROOT_AUTH_TOKEN for login validation
emits admin auth success and failure events
persists and queries api_keys table via Drizzle
logs API key lifecycle operations and failures
reads PUBLIC_URL, OAUTH_ISSUER, OAUTH_REQUIRED_SCOPES for metadata output
logs oauth discovery route behavior
uses issuer and timeout/cache settings to load signing keys
emits jwks fetch and cache diagnostics
retrieves signing key material for token verification
validates token claims against configured issuer, audience, and required scopes
logs token validation allow/deny decisions
delegates bearer access token validation and maps results to auth decisions
logs /mcp auth guard decisions and challenge metadata
enforces admin session guard on protected UI routes
renders OAuth config diagnostics for operators
keeps repository dependency during route deprecation transition
emits admin route and HTMX action logs
emits schema validation diagnostics
uses base URL, bearer token, and timeout settings
emits upstream request and failure logs
reads TG_CHAT_RAG_CHAT_IDS for enforced search scope
validates tool inputs and enforces allowlist
forwards validated tool calls to upstream methods API
emits proxy decisions and error mapping logs
registers MCP tools with public schemas
routes tool handlers to proxy execution
emits request lifecycle logs
reads server and auth settings
initializes DB dependency for runtime foundation
creates repository for admin UI surface compatibility; /mcp auth path uses OAuth validator pipeline
routes /admin/login and session guard checks
mounts admin route handlers
mounts OAuth protected-resource discovery metadata routes
enforces OAuth authorization before transport
creates runtime OAuth token validator used by /mcp auth guard wiring
creates upstream tg-chat-rag client for proxied MCP tool execution
creates tool proxy service used by MCP transport handlers
mounts /mcp transport handler after auth checks
emits boot and shutdown logs
invokes server main bootstrap
verifies transport tool exposure and request routing smoke behavior
verifies unauthorized, insufficient-scope, and authorized /mcp behavior
uses validator context types while exercising integrated auth-gating behavior
verifies standardized /mcp unauthorized response helper behavior
packages server runtime entrypoint into deployment image
injects runtime environment consumed by config loader
runs MCP server process in development container profile
provides runtime env variables for config loading in development profile
builds MCP runtime image from local Dockerfile in development profile
runs MCP server process in production container profile
provides required runtime env variables for production config loading
builds MCP runtime image from Dockerfile for production deployment
